checked_paths: all audited dependency repos searched for the listed symbols
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No local audited repo monitors configured ExecutorRegistry logs or recognizes ExecutorRegistered, ExecutorWentOffline, and ExecutorUpdated event signatures in place of old TeeDA signatures.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs still defines ExecutorRegistry and deactivate_executor, but it is only an in-memory map and has no log-watching service.
ritual-tee-registry-reader reads TEEServiceRegistry storage via TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS; it does not decode ExecutorRegistry event logs.

ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs syncs registry state from storage before execution but uses TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS and read_all_executors, not ExecutorRegistry event receipts.

notes: Confirmed by exact event-symbol searches across all audited local repos; the current local architecture reads registry storage instead of consuming ExecutorRegistry event logs.
rationale: The merge commit renames the monitored address to executor_registry_address, changes event signature hashes to the ExecutorRegistry ABI, routes ExecutorWentOffline to a new handler, and changes configuration from TEEDA_CONTRACT_ADDRESS to EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS with a new default. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The SPC executor registry service must monitor the configured ExecutorRegistry contract address and recognize ExecutorRegistered(address,address,uint8,bytes32,uint8,bytes), ExecutorWentOffline(address), and ExecutorUpdated(address,address,uint8,bytes32,uint8,bytes) events instead of the old TeeDA event signatures.
suggested_falsification_tests: Feed the service receipts containing logs from the configured ExecutorRegistry address with the new event signatures and old TeeDA signatures; assert only the new ExecutorRegistry signatures update/deactivate executors, and assert EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS controls the monitored address.
summary: ExecutorRegistry log-signature handling is absent from the audited local repos.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Feed new and old event signatures into the current local node; no registry log service exists to distinguish or apply them.
title: ExecutorRegistry logs replace TeeDA logs
